page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance type belonging to the ecs.g9ae server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor built on the x86_64 architecture. The instance features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating at a base clock speed of 2.25 GHz with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration. This dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource sharing or hyperthreading overhead.

The server is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core ratio. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 100 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given its high core density, dedicated CPU allocation, and balanced memory-to-core ratio, this instance is suited for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, distributed caching, and high-throughput web serving. The lack of local storage requires architectural planning for external storage dependencies, while the dedicated core model offers predictable performance for compute-intensive tasks that do not benefit from hyperthreading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 768.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. It delivers a high baseline network bandwidth of 100 Gbps. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale enterprise applications, distributed databases, and high-throughput web serving where dedicated, non-hyperthreaded compute resources and high network capacity are required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9ae.48xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 192 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 768 GB RAM, and 100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage.

tagline: A high-density, non-hyperthreaded compute platform with balanced memory and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated physical AMD EPYC 9T95 cores with 1.0 thread per core.
768.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio.
100 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfers.
Zero local storage and no integrated GPUs, requiring network-attached storage.
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization on x86_64 architecture.
Suited for large-scale enterprise applications, distributed databases, and web serving.
